33 Years Experience

Regardless of the size of your home, maintaining it can be a struggle. While you may not have the time or the tools to accomplish everything on your to-do list, what you do have is a local Handyman with a reliable expertise who offers handyman services with a Done Right Guarantee.

Family based

Homeowners have trusted tOdd Jobs since January of 2019 for home improvement, repair, installation and property maintenance service. You don’t want to put your life on hold to fix the door that won’t close, or patch the hole in your drywall, and we understand that. That’s why we respect your schedule and arrive with all the tools and equipment necessary to provide an efficient, reliable handyman service. It is our goal to keep your home in tip top shape so you can stay on track.

Why hire tOdd Jobs for your home repairs?

Why hire tOdd Jobs for your home repairs?

Trustworthy

Smart homeowners opt for tOdd-Jobs when seeking home improvement assistance, as they can rely on our craftsmen to be punctual and fully transparent regarding their services and associated costs.

Local

At tOdd-Jobs, we take pride in being a contributing member of our community, whether it’s by enhancing your home or creating employment opportunities locally. It’s good to have a familiar face to rely on for those significant projects or unexpected  emergencies.

Done Right! Guaranteed

We believe in exceptional service and quality workmanship which is why we back every job we do with our Done-Right guarantee on labor and material or we will be out promptly to make it right!

Experienced

You don’t get 33 years worth of building and repairing experience without loving to work with your hands. From my house to yours we’ve done a Texas lot of fixen.
